welcome.title: Welcome to Recrest
welcome.tagline: A lightweight developer dashboard for your local repos and merge requests.
welcome.body: Let's set things up in a minute — a few preferences, then pick the folders where your code lives, and you're ready.

basics.title: Basic preferences
basics.body: Pick how Recrest should look and behave. You can change all of this later in Settings.
basics.theme_desc: Follow your system or pick a fixed appearance.
basics.auto_start_desc: Launch Recrest automatically when you log in.
basics.close_to_tray_desc: Keep running in the system tray when the window closes.
basics.notifications_desc: Notify me about new merge requests and CI results.

pickFolder.title: Where are your repositories?
pickFolder.body: Add one or more folders. Recrest will scan them recursively for git repositories.
pickFolder.at_least_one: Add at least one folder to continue.

connectProvider.title: Connect a Git host
connectProvider.body: Optional — connect GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket to see your open merge requests here. You can skip and add this later in Settings.
connectProvider.local_note: Your local git status, branches and uncommitted changes are shown regardless. This only adds merge-request visibility.
connectProvider.failed: Could not connect. Check the token and try again.

scan.title: Scanning your folders
scan.empty: No repositories found. You can add more folders later in Settings.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: Recrest is ready. Browse your repositories and merge requests from the sidebar.
